name: edit_file
description:
Apply a single targeted edit to a workspace file by replacing an exact occurrence of `old_text` with `new_text`. Fails if `old_text` does not occur exactly once (use `read_file` first to disambiguate, or pass `expected_count` to permit multi-match replace). Atomic via tempfile + rename. Subject to the §11 sandbox; counts as a §3 staged edit until the turn's atomic-diff application commits.

Prefer this over read+write_file for surgical edits — it avoids re-sending the whole file and makes the §7 'did-it-do-what-it-said' diff readable.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path. Absolute paths must be inside the §11 sandbox.

old_text.description: The exact text to replace. Whitespace-sensitive. Must occur exactly `expected_count` times (default 1) or the call fails with `ToolError::ExecutionFailed`.

new_text.description: Replacement text. May be empty (to delete the matched range).

expected_count.description: Number of occurrences expected. Use >1 only when you've explicitly verified all occurrences should change identically.
